retrieved_result: What Is a Ficelle? A ficelle is a type of French bread that is long and thin, like a thick bread stick, but still moist and spongy inside the crust. This type of bread loaf is about half the size of the typical French baguettes sold at grocery store bakeries. Ficelles can be as long as a standard baguette, but thinner
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses a type of French bread (ficelle) and has no relation to IDEs or software development; thus it is not relevant to the query.
